payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Close-up view (approx. 1.0 m) of a dark brown leather recliner shown in left-side profile; the crop is partial/edge-cropped and includes the padded armrest, sagging seat cushion, creased/wrinkled leather surface and a visible reclining lever on the side. Backrest shows horizontal seam lines and the leather appears worn with surface wrinkles and soft cushioning; chair is angled slightly away from the camera.
